overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing nighttime driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit city. The vehicle navigates multi-lane streets, intersections, and industrial areas with elevated highways and holographic billboards visible throughout the atmospheric urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane arterial road with elevated transit

events.description: black sedan overtakes on the left side of the vehicle
slight lane adjustment to the right while maintaining speed

agents.ego_description: driving straight on wet multi-lane road following traffic flow beneath elevated highway

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking on the left side
yellow taxi driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: curved elevated highway structure with red warning lights spanning across the road
commercial building with bright cyan neon signage and glass facade
tall palm tree visible on the right sidewalk against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives straight on a wet multi-lane arterial road beneath a massive elevated monorail track. Neon-lit commercial buildings line the left side while palm trees dot the right sidewalk. Other vehicles including a black sedan and yellow taxi share the road in moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with commercial buildings and street signage

events.description: approaching intersection with Santa Cruz street sign visible overhead
executing right turn at the intersection

agents.ego_description: turning right at the Santa Cruz intersection while navigating around other vehicles and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking on sidewalk near the corner

entered.detail: green street sign reading Santa Cruz suspended over the intersection
large building entrance with illuminated archway on the right side of intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and executes a right turn at the Santa Cruz intersection. The elevated monorail track shifts to the left side of the frame as the car turns, revealing a commercial building with an illuminated archway. Sparse pedestrian activity is visible on the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with advertising poster walls

events.description: entering narrower industrial street with poster-covered walls on the left
passing under darker section with reduced neon lighting and more shadow

agents.ego_description: driving through industrial district past illuminated advertising posters and warehouses

notable_agents.action: person walking along the poster wall on the left sidewalk

entered.detail: long wall covered with illuminated holographic advertisements including a cereal mascot character
large industrial building with corrugated metal exterior and minimal lighting
tall metal lattice tower with power lines extending across the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a narrower industrial street characterized by a long wall of illuminated advertising posters on the left and industrial warehouses on the right. A power transmission tower looms in the distance while the elevated monorail track remains visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with traffic control and crosswalks

events.description: stopping at red traffic light at the intersection
traffic light changes to green and vehicle begins moving forward
pedestrian crosses in front of the vehicle at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light waiting for signal change, then proceeding carefully through the intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in shorts crossing the street from left to right in front of the vehicle
black car waiting at the intersection on the left side

entered.detail: tall traffic signal showing red then changing to green
large illuminated advertisement showing a person holding a beverage
zebra crossing stripes painted on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at a red traffic light at a major intersection, waiting for the signal to change. A large digital billboard is visible on the right. When the light turns green, the car proceeds forward as a pedestrian crosses in front at the crosswalk. The elevated monorail track now runs closer on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street beneath elevated highway with pedestrian amenities

events.description: executing right turn at the intersection
merging with traffic flow on the new street

agents.ego_description: turning right and continuing down the street beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: person standing near street corner next to trash receptacles

entered.detail: white sign with black numbers 03 mounted on building facade
row of benches under the elevated structure for pedestrian seating
green and blue waste bins on the sidewalk near the corner

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a right turn and continues down an urban street running beneath the elevated monorail track. Public benches and trash receptacles line the right sidewalk. The large digital billboard from the previous intersection remains visible ahead while the street sign '03' marks the building on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city, transitioning from a wide arterial road into a dense industrial corridor and finally through a narrow urban street. It begins by cruising beneath a massive elevated monorail track on a wet multi-lane road lined with neon commercial buildings and palm trees. As the vehicle executes a right turn at the Santa Cruz intersection, the perspective shifts to reveal an illuminated archway before the road narrows into an industrial zone characterized by long walls of advertising posters and looming power towers. The scene then pauses at a red light beneath a large digital billboard, only to proceed forward as a pedestrian crosses the street. Finally, the camera turns right once more, gliding past public benches and a building marked with the sign 03 while remaining tucked under the shadow of the monorail track.
